---
title: "Preprocessing"
output: html_document
---

Write a function that will load a table from the IMDb files in the `data/` directory.
  * The function should take the file name (without the ".csv.gz" portion) as an argument
  * The function should load the appropriate `.csv.gz` file.
  * Make sure that all "\\N" values (which IMDB uses to indicate missing values) are turned into proper NA values in R
  * The function should return the table.
  
```{r}
imdb_table <- function(file_name) {
  file_name <- paste0(file_name, ".csv.gz")
  return(as.data.frame(read.csv(file_name, na.strings = "\\N")))
  
}

name_basics <- imdb_table("name_basics_sample")
title_basics <- imdb_table("title_basics_sample")
title_principals <- imdb_table("title_principals_sample")
title_ratings <- imdb_table("title_ratings_sample")

write_rds(name_basics, "name_basics.rda")
write_rds(title_basics, "title_basics.rda")
write_rds(title_principals, "title_principals.rda")
write_rds(title_ratings, "title_ratings.rda")



```
